title: Shuffle Workflow Execution
description: A workflow execution instance in the Shuffle SOAR platform representing a single run of a workflow.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow that was executed

started_at.description: Execution start timestamp in Unix milliseconds

completed_at.description: Execution completion timestamp in Unix milliseconds

execution_argument.description: Input data passed to the workflow at execution start

authorization.description: Authorization token for polling execution status

result.description: Final output from the last workflow action

results.description: Results from each action in the workflow

ActionResult.description: Result from an individual action in the workflow execution

action.description: The action that produced this result
